L

LEFT - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
Move one column to the left (x = -1).
level - Variable in class game.Game
 
Level - Class in generation
Represents a game level, managing the map, player movement, and game rules.
Level(String, Player) - Constructor for class generation.Level
Constructs a new Level from a file.
levels - Variable in class game.Game
 
lives - Variable in class generation.characters.Character
Number of lives remaining.
LockedDoor - Class in generation.map
Represents a locked door cell in the game map.
LockedDoor(int[], String) - Constructor for class generation.map.LockedDoor
Constructs a new LockedDoor at the given position.
